stories.title: Create .env.example with all environment variables
stories.description: Create environment variables template file listing all required API keys and configuration options for the AgentFloor project.
stories.agentInstructions: Use architecture-patterns skill. Create .env.example at project root with all environment variables needed for multi-provider LLM support, Colyseus server, ElevenLabs voice, and GitHub integration.

stories.title: Create error boundary component
stories.description: Create React error boundary for graceful error handling in the UI with retry capability.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Displays fallback UI with retry button

stories.agentInstructions: Use frontend-design skill. Spawn frontend-engineer subagent. Create error boundary component at src/components/ui/error-boundary.tsx.

stories.title: Create settings store with localStorage persistence
stories.description: Zustand store for user settings persisted to localStorage including provider configs and UI preferences.
stories.agentInstructions: Use architecture-patterns skill. Create Zustand store with persist middleware at src/lib/store/settings-store.ts.

stories.title: Create OfficeScene Phaser scene class
stories.description: Dedicated Phaser scene class for the office environment with proper lifecycle management.

acceptanceCriteria.description: create() sets up floor grid and agents

stories.agentInstructions: Use frontend-design and react-performance skills. Spawn frontend-engineer subagent. Create Phaser scene at src/game/scenes/OfficeScene.ts.

stories.title: Create AgentSprite Phaser class
stories.description: Phaser sprite class for agent characters with animations, status indicators, and interactions.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Contains sprite, name label, status indicator

stories.agentInstructions: Use frontend-design skill. Spawn frontend-engineer subagent. Create sprite class at src/game/sprites/AgentSprite.ts.

stories.title: Integrate EasyStar.js pathfinding
stories.description: Add pathfinding for agent movement between locations using EasyStar.js library.
stories.agentInstructions: Use architecture-patterns skill. Install easystarjs and create pathfinding utility at src/game/utils/pathfinding.ts.

stories.description: Allow reactions on chat messages (thumbs up, eyes, checkmark).
stories.agentInstructions: Use frontend-design skill. Create component at src/components/chat/MessageReactions.tsx.

stories.description: Handle WebSocket disconnection and reconnection gracefully with exponential backoff.
